task_completion.description: The Avare aviation app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Avare application interface running on the device.

task_completion.description: The User Defined Waypoint creation screen or dialog is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A menu, dialog, or screen specifically for adding or creating a new waypoint is visible in the Avare app.
The text 'LKPK' is visible inside the waypoint name input field.
The latitude '37.475' and longitude '-122.170' are visible in the coordinate input fields.

task_completion.description: The waypoint is saved and visible in the app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message of the saved waypoint, the waypoint 'LKPK' appearing in a list of saved waypoints, or 'LKPK' displayed on the map at the specified coordinates.

integrity.description: The agent used the Avare graphical user interface to create the waypoint.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Avare's menus and text fields, rather than a terminal window or script executing commands to modify backend files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Avare application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is the Avare app, not a text editor modifying a CSV/KML file or a web browser looking up coordinates.

integrity.description: The final waypoint creation appears genuine within the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The created waypoint is displayed using Avare's native UI elements (map pins, native lists) rather than a typed note or external file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified tolerance for coordinates is 0.01 degrees. The VLM should accept coordinates within 37.465 to 37.485 for latitude and -122.160 to -122.180 for longitude.
